title: Coinbase Q1 2024 Earnings Smash Expectations
text: Coinbase delivered exceptional first-quarter 2024 performance with $1.6 billion in revenue, a 72% sequential increase substantially exceeding market expectations of $1.34 billion in revenue and $1.09 earnings per share. Company posted net income of $1.18 billion ($4.40 per share). Consumer transactions surged dramatically with revenue doubling to $935.2 million and trading volume jumping 93% to $56 billion. Institutional trading showed even stronger growth, increasing 133% to $85.4 million in revenue, while volume more than doubled to $256 billion. Bitcoin comprised one-third of both consumer and institutional trading activity. Company highlighted meaningful progress: Made meaningful progress against 2024 priorities of driving revenue, utility, and regulatory clarity. However, $737 million of earnings came from one-time paper gain from new accounting rules permitting crypto firms to record price increases on balance sheets. Transaction expenses grew 73% to $217 million, reflecting higher costs associated with increased trading volumes.
